questions.q: How many episodes of 'Sesame Street' is Tubi adding to its free streaming service starting April 1, 2026?
questions.correctText: Tubi is adding 250 episodes of 'Sesame Street' to its free streaming service.

questions.q: Which actor announced the official wrap of 'Jumanji 3' production, dedicating it to Robin Williams?
questions.correctText: Dwayne Johnson announced the official wrap of 'Jumanji 3' production and dedicated the final installment to Robin Williams.

questions.q: The original voice cast of 'The Powerpuff Girls' recently reunited. Which character's voice actor, Tom Kane, was part of this reunion after suffering a stroke in 2020?
questions.correctText: The original voice cast of 'The Powerpuff Girls' reunited, including Tom Kane, the voice actor for Professor Utonium, who suffered a stroke in 2020.

questions.q: What is the reason for the strike by Alamo Drafthouse workers in Colorado, starting April 1, 2026?
options: Shift to phone orders during movies
questions.correctText: Alamo Drafthouse workers in Colorado are striking over the shift to phone orders during movies.

questions.q: When is the new 'Supergirl' movie, for which an official trailer was recently released, scheduled to land in cinemas?
questions.correctText: The new 'Supergirl' movie is scheduled to land in cinemas on June 26, 2026.
